programme.title: Risks And Side Effects
programme.desc: When Pilates trainer Kathrin needs a new kidney, her husband’s hesitation to be her donor results in a crisis in their marriage. Faced with issues of life and death, the fragility of the couple’s relationship is laid bare.

programme.title: The Vanishing Soldier
programme.desc: An 18-year-old Israeli soldier flees the Gaza battlefield and heads back to his girlfriend in Tel Aviv only to discover that the military elite is convinced he was kidnapped in the fog of war.

programme.title: Train Driver's Diary
programme.desc: As Ilija nears retirement, his record of unintentional deaths as a train driver weighs heavy. His adopted son, Sima, fears following in his footsteps. But as days pass without incident, Ilija's determination to ensure Sima's success takes a dark turn.

programme.title: Djam
programme.desc: Djam, a bold young Greek woman, travels to Istanbul to look for an engine part for her uncle’s boat. She meets a stranded and penniless Avril, who is a volunteer for Syrian refugees. Together, they embark on a lively, music-filled journey to Mytilene.

programme.title: The Black Minutes
programme.desc: Vicente Rangel, a musician turned detective, embarks on a police case to catch a murderer of girls in a corrupt oil town on the Gulf of Mexico.

programme.title: Submission
programme.desc: Lúcia is raped by her husband and presses charges against him. In her quest for justice, she must battle her husband who is the son of the State's Vice Attorney, and the Portuguese legal system with its patriarchal beliefs.

programme.title: Sarah Kohr: Ghost Lights
programme.desc: In a post-pandemic Europe, conspiracy theorist Felix Morgenroth becomes obsessed with exposing the "coronavirus lie." Convinced that physicians Carsten and Lisa Kippmann were behind the conspiracy, Felix seeks retribution through a devastating explosion.

programme.title: A Tale of Samurai Cooking - A True Love Story
programme.desc: Great cook Haru has married into the legendary “Kitchen Samurai” family. But her husband who is the successor of the Funaki family cannot cook at all. Haru makes a vow to make him a superb samurai chef and starts teaching her new husband how to cook.

programme.title: A Thousand Times Good Night
programme.desc: Rebecca is one of the world's top war photographers. She must weather a major emotional storm when her husband and young daughters refuse to put up with her dangerous life any longer. They need Rebecca, who, however, loves both her family and her work.

programme.title: Kaaga Re
programme.desc: After the mysterious death of one his regular passengers, Kulleh a boatman is driven to insanity as he tries to find her body and bury it.

programme.title: Martinez
programme.desc: Martinez, an embittered Chilean in his sixties who has lived in Mexico for the past 40 years, is being forced to retire from his job. As he struggles with life changes, things change as a neighbour suddenly dies.

Thomson ProbioGut 是一款优质的益生菌补充剂，专为支持消化健康、增强免疫力和促进整体健康而设计。采用两种临床研究认证的日本益生菌菌株— 有助于改善肠道菌群、调节排便，并维持健康的体重

programme.title: The Wonder Shop (Home Shopping) - TIGER EDGE SLB-A10U Food Blender
programme.desc: A premium innovation—patented 45° angled blades crush fruits, frozen foods, and ice while keeping flavor. The angled vortex ensures smooth blends, with 10 speeds for any texture. Lightweight Tritan cup and removable blades make cleaning easy, while the compact, stylish design delivers full functionality for daily use. 全新上市，专利 45° 斜角刀片，轻松粉碎水果、冷冻食材与冰块，完美保留食材原味。倾斜漩涡设计，让食材混合顺滑，10 段速度随心调节。轻调理杯、可拆刀座，清洗方便，操作简单，功能全面又时尚。

programme.title: The Wonder Shop (Home Shopping) - Thermos TCMF-501 0.5L Mug with Strainer & Handle
programme.desc: Sleek and lightweight Thermos Mug with strainer for you to enjoy your tea to the fullest. Suitable for everyday use! 一杯多用， 茶水分离, 设计典雅的茶漏咖啡杯让你方便携带！

programme.title: The Wonder Shop (Home Shopping) - Nature’s Farm Pycnogenol
programme.desc: Nature’s Farm Pycnogenol® is a premium antioxidant supplement made from 100% pure French Maritime Pine Bark extract (100mg), sourced exclusively from the Les Landes de Gascogne forest in France. Supported by over 160 clinical trials and 450 scientific studies, it helps fight oxidative stress and promotes overall wellness—benefiting the brain, eyes, heart, joints, skin, and blood sugar balance for all ages. NatureFarm's碧容健®，源自法国滨海松树皮萃取物，是一款高效天然抗氧化营养品。经过160项临床试验与450篇科学研究验证，全面帮助抵御氧化压力，守护大脑、眼睛、心脏、关节、肌肤及血糖健康，适合各年龄层日常保健

programme.title: The Wonder Shop (Home Shopping) - ASD Hybrid 3-ply Hex Wok 32 & 36cm
programme.desc: This cookware is made with strong stainless steel and a long-lasting non-stick coating from Whitford (USA). Its 7-layer design ensures even heat distribution and helps keep heat longer, providing great cooking results every time. Perfect for those looking for high-quality, easy-to-use kitchen tools. ASD爱仕达316不锈钢不粘炒锅采用三层钢结构与耐高温不粘涂层，结合了不锈钢的耐用与不粘锅的便捷。蜂窝纹理设计省油防粘，食材加热均匀，不怕铁铲和钢丝球刮擦，适合烹饪各种坚硬食材。

programme.title: The Wonder Shop (Home Shopping) - Naturalle Sugar Care Tea
programme.desc: Crafted from 100% natural leaves including gymnema, mulberry and green tea, the Naturalle Sugar Care tea is mild-flavoured and low in calories. A perfect post-meal beverage, this tea may help curb sugar cravings and support healthy post-meal blood sugar levels, making it great for individuals who frequently consume carbohydrate-rich or sugary foods. Naturalle 糖适宁茶采用 100% 天然叶材精制而成，包括匙羹藤、桑叶与绿茶，口感清淡、低热量。糖适宁茶是适合餐后饮用，有助于抑制对甜食的渴望和维持血糖健康水平，非常适合经常摄取高碳水或含糖食物的人士饮用

programme.title: The Wonder Shop (Home Shopping) - Nature's Farm® Krill Oil 180s
programme.desc: Nature’s Farm Krill Oil is made with SUPERBA 2™ krill oil, one of the most researched krill oils, backed by over 130 clinical trials. It is pure, sustainable, and traceable from catch to capsule. Rich in omega-3s, astaxanthin, phospholipids, and choline, it supports heart, brain, liver, eye, skin, and joint health. Nature's Farm来自南极的磷虾油，富含优质Omega-3脂肪酸和虾红素, 有助于维持胆固醇水平、维护心 脏、大脑和关节健康！ 人体对磷虾油的吸收率更高，没有难闻的鱼腥味，软胶囊更容易吞服，一天2颗有助于维护整体健康！

programme.title: Warna Ramadan - EP 9
programme.desc: Ramadan becomes more meaningful through the spirit of compassion and sharing. In episode 9, SEMBANG highlights the inspiration for charitable giving by business owner Halim Samdin and its benefits to the community. HIDANG features Chef Syed Shah with Bubur Lambuk, a traditional recipe that is a Ramadan must-have. GAYA shares smart, budget-friendly tips for transforming the style of the dining space.

programme.title: Dapur Vaganza - EP 5
programme.desc: Join the stars of Gegar Vaganza as they light up the kitchen, cooking, entertaining and getting ready for Ramadan while sharing laughter and stories with host Kak Lina and Tok Ram.

programme.title: Bunga Salju - EP 6
programme.desc: Farouk breaks into Azizi’s house to destroy CCTV footage linking him to Budi’s fall. When he awakens from his coma, Budi pretends to have memory loss. As Farouk’s debtors close in, his desperation to get money from Azizi intensifies.

programme.title: Melur Untuk Firdaus 2 - EP 31
programme.desc: After several unsuccessful interviews, Firdaus seeks advice from Kamarul on whether he should start his own business or join Kamarul's company.

programme.title: Belah Hati - EP 12
programme.desc: Shafiq refuses to accept the hospital’s offer to settle, much to the shock of his own lawyer and Nur. He appears to be greedy! Later, the hospital finds grounds to countersue him for defamation. Farhan wishes to stay with Ida but Ida does not want to accept him in. Farhan is shocked. Said leaves home as he thinks he is the main reason why the family is torn apart. He hopes that after he is gone, they can all make peace with one another.

programme.title: Kemelut - EP 5
programme.desc: Kemelut (Life Crisis) Kemelut is a drama series that focuses on the different life crises of an affluent Malay family of four. To the public, Rusdis family is seen as the ideal family With everyone living their own lives, they are trying to keep each other out from their affairs, brewing lies ....

programme.title: Rahasia Dan Cinta - EP 9
programme.desc: Dwita, the daughter of a prominent entrepreneur finds herself caught in an arranged marriage with Greg - a match orchestrated by their fathers to merge their companies. Aware that Dwita would likely resist this plan, her father assigns her a personal bodyguard, Debu, to keep her in line. As Dwita, Greg and Deby embark on this unexpected journey together, a series of challenges and complications arise, turning Dwita's life upside down.

programme.title: Tuah 13 S4 - EP 3
programme.desc: Tuah 13 returns with for an electrifying Season 4, building on the success of its first three seasons, which boasted stellar ratings and prize money totalling more than 250,000. This season, the series continues its appeal by featuring thrilling rounds, escalating stakes, and the chance for teams to win up to 13,000 in every episode. Open to the public and featuring celebrity guest participants, Tuah13 delivers an electrifying mix of teamwork, strategy, and knowledge. The show covers a diver

programme.title: Cuci S2 - EP 10
programme.desc: Struggling with grief, Afnan and Emma find it hard to accept Mairah's death, as distance grows between father and daughter. Yati arrives from Australia to support them, while Husin returns to help CSS. Overwhelmed, Emma seeks more pills from Aaron only to face a dangerous situation with 2 mysterious guys.

programme.title: Papa Ricky - EP 27
programme.desc: Tensions rise when Zarul goes on a date with Zara, only for Gibran and Suziela to unexpectedly run into them. At the same time, Alisya questions Riqmal about his past relationship with Zara.

programme.title: Warna Ramadan - EP 10
programme.desc: Not sure what to do with leftover dates? Get some ideas In Hidang where Chef Zan shares the recipe for Pistachio Date Tart. We also share some tips to keep abayas looking stylish and updated and save the need to buying new ones. We also talk about how wastage and excessiveness can be reduced with mindful budgeting in Sembang.

programme.title: Dapur Vaganza - EP 6
programme.desc: Join the stars of Gegar Vaganza as they light up the kitchen, cooking, entertaining and getting ready for Ramadan while sharing laughter and stories with host Kak Lina and Tok Ram.

programme.title: Bunga Salju - EP 7
programme.desc: Farouk threatens to expose his past with Qaisara unless she helps him siphon Azizi’s money. Budi later confronts Qaisara about her and Farouk’s involvement in the incident that left him in a coma.

programme.title: (Live) Berita
programme.desc: Catch the latest local and international news on Suria.

programme.title: Detik Semasa - EP 25
programme.desc: The program analyses and dissect issues of concern to the Malay/Muslim Singaporeans - be it at the community level, national, regional or global. Apart from raising awareness, each DETIK episode hopes to set viewers thinking and make informed decisions on matters that can impact their lives.

programme.title: Sembang Sihat S3 - EP 8
programme.desc: Hosted by Ainon Talib and Zuhairi Idris, Sembang Sihat takes on a fresh, gripping new direction blending health education with medical mystery storytelling to create a more interactive, relatable, and engaging viewer experience.

programme.title: Cuci S2 - EP 11
programme.desc: Saved by Dani and Hilmi, Emma begins to confront the damage she's done to herself. Yati pushes Afnan to realise that Emma needs him more than ever. With Azri's help, Emma faces Peter. Mr Ng pressures Husin to hunt for post-trauma cleaning jobs. Emma makes a shocking decision that aggravates her relationship between Afnan and her grandparents .

programme.title: Andai Tiada Dia - EP 35
programme.desc: Suri gives birth as Falah is admitted to hospital, unaware that she will soon receive devastating news.

programme.desc: Episode 11 of Warna Ramadan looks at how working parents manage social media expectations placed on children in SEMBANG. programme.title: Masih Ada Yang Peduli - EP 1
programme.desc: High up in the mountains of Gilgit, Pakistan, a former military officer and his wife have started a unique school to educate the children of this isolated valley. They face many challenges in changing an age-old tradition where it is believed, daughters should not be educated. In the meantime, an NGO operating from Singapore has set up schools for the children of the Syrian refugees. These schools, operating from tents and buses, have also been an effective tool to help these children overcome
